zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Langton於大約1322年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Robert de Langston13歲，母親Margaret de Orrell21歲。她與Lord John de Clayton IV結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國藍卡爾利藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Langton于大约1322年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Robert de Langston13岁，母亲Margaret de Orrell21岁。她与Lord John de Clayton IV结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国藍卡爾利藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Langton was born about 1322, in Lancashire, England, her father, Robert de Langston, was 13 and her mother, Margaret de Orrell, was 21. She married Lord John de Clayton IV. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Langton est née environ 1322, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Langston, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Orrell, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John de Clayton IV. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Langton um 1322 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Langston 13 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Orrell 21. Sie hat Lord John de Clayton IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Langton è nata il circa 1322 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert de Langston, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Orrell, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Lord John de Clayton IV. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Leyland, Lancashire, England.

ja.Leyland, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアリーランド
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Langtonが約1322年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Langstonは13歳，母Margaret de Orrellは21歳であった。Lord John de Clayton IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Langton(이)가 대략 1322년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Langston(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Orrell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Lord John de Clayton IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Langton nasceu aproximadamente 1322, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Langston, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Orrell, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John de Clayton IV. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Langton родилась около 1322 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Langston было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Orrell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John de Clayton IV. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Langton nació aproximadamente 1322, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Langston, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Margaret de Orrell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lord John de Clayton IV. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
